## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Testing

- [ ] `make validate`
- [ ] `make test-gateway`
- [ ] `make test-types`
- [ ] `pnpm turbo run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm --dir apps/dashboard lint`
- [ ] Other relevant checks were run and are described below

## Notes

- Linked issue:
- Screenshots or API examples, if applicable:
- Follow-up work or known limitations:

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is focused on one problem
- [ ] Docs were updated where behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when logic changed
- [ ] No secrets or private data were committed
